headline: Agent orchestration tooling led the week as subagents, skill composition, and scheduled tasks all moved together.
body: The cluster of agent-building primitives broke out as one, with subagents, skill composition, and scheduled tasks each posting top momentum, anchored by a seven-level Hermes agent walkthrough that connects multiple LLM providers, custom skills, parallel sub-agents, and scheduling into unified workflows. Enterprise agents pushed in the same direction, with Microsoft Scout acting proactively across Teams, email, and calendar, and MiniMax M3 shipping open weights with million-token context and dual Anthropic and OpenAI API compatibility. Reliability surfaced as a counterweight: a Bright Data demonstration showed agents claiming to search the web while silently failing on CAPTCHAs and falling back to stale data. On the technique side, scheduling, zero-trust, and prompt caching broke out, alongside new entrants in iframe sandboxing such as sandboxed iframe, same-origin policy, and srcdoc.
